title: Herman HERMAN.md frontmatter v2
description: YAML frontmatter schema for HERMAN.md template manifests. The Markdown body (## Setup, ## Questions, ## Guidance) is intentionally schema-free.

extends.description: Id of another curated Herman manifest to inherit from. Ordered arrays (setup, env.files, servers, checks) are replaced wholesale by the child when re-declared.

setup_goal.description: Goal passed to the wizard coding session (pi-goal). A sensible default is used when omitted.

why.description: Plain-language reason shown to non-technical users.

install_cmd.description: Template-author override for the install command.

optional.description: When true, missing is a warning instead of a block.

env.description: Environment files, provisioned in declared order before setup steps run.

path.description: Env file path relative to the workspace root.

from_main.description: Copy from the main project when present.

from_example.description: Fallback: copy from this file inside the workspace.

merge.description: missing_only fills only absent vars; force overwrites.

rewrite_paths.description: Rewrite absolute main-root paths to workspace paths.

value.description: Literal value; ${HERMAN_*} interpolated at provisioning time.

session.description: Built-in per-session binding (ports reserved before setup runs).

generate.description: Shell command whose stdout becomes the value; runs AFTER setup steps.

required.description: Wizard: ask the user for this value.

notes.description: Rookie-facing notes: why needed / how to get the key.

setup.description: Ordered, idempotent tasks for a FRESH workspace.

run.description: Shell command, run via `sh -c` in the workspace.

skip_if_env.description: Env var non-empty in `env_file` (default: first env file) → skip.

port.description: Preferred port; the actual reserved port is injected via portEnv.

primary.description: Drives the preview pane when true. Exactly one should be primary.

exportUrlAs.description: Env var name(s) set on every Herman-spawned server to this server's resolved URL.

portEnv.description: Env var name(s) set on this server's spawn environment to its resolved port (e.g. SERVER_PORT).

checks.description: Host-enforced verification commands run by the wizard coding/QA gates before a phase advances.

run.description: Shell command, run via `sh -c` in the project root.
